description: Asset migration manifest for Slice 18 18d. Each entry maps an apps/web/static/<path> to its target Directus folder + metadata. Consumed by scripts/migrate-assets.ts.

folders.brand: Site-chrome assets — hero art, metro illustrations, logo (18l).
folders.about: About-page assets — headshot, interests, logos, polaroids.
folders.og: OG-share images per route — populated by 18h.

assets.title: Montreal metro map
assets.description: Stylized Montreal metro map illustration; visual anchor for the services-as-stations metaphor.

assets.description: Portrait photograph of Yesid; used as the primary author image on the /about page.
